title: Extra Ruby
description: A mod that adds vanilla-similar Ruby tools and armor in the game.
body:
This simple mod made in MCreator using both Pure Emerald Tools and Minecraft modified textures adds consistent Ruby equipment in the Game, it should normally be bug-free for very obvious reasons.

You should use J.E.I or R.E.I to get the exact recipes, but you shouldn't have trouble guessing them.


<details>
<summary>Informations</summary>

This mod adds 10 new tools and 2 new armors, one being the Ruby set, and the other one being the Ruby-Netherite set.

It also adds a few items to complete the crafting, like Ruby Ore, Ruby Vein, Ruby Gemstone, Ruby Block and Ruby Ameliorator.

![A ruby block placed in a frame, next to a ruby gemstone, a ruby vein, a ruby sphere and a ruby ore.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e9092ca0dc08c60cfa683178c3f8a17d35c596e3.png)

![A full ruby toolset for Minecraft.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/184b3c492129ba6d3bd5d8028a566823092ce238.png)

![A full ruby netherite toolset in Minecraft.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cc9eb23e5213d414b3c0e93b9dc44f26065fbd05.png)

![A full ruby armor set in Minecraft.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d81b10dead6338c8f461096e4c024a0672272d5d.png)

![A full ruby netherite armor set in Minecraft.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/18bf31a2b2ca5f13c3c92b5482ef71d5137634aa.png)

A few screenshots on character:

![A full ruby armor set on a Minecraft player.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/72d18f1c6cd1103394c503d789367f036e107a52.png)

![A full ruby netherite armor set on a Minecraft player.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d4594f6e7e98dd381f2adba4b5a03d1cfeb618ec.png)

</details>


<details>
<summary>Recipes</summary>

I will put the recipes here because I think some of them might be tedious to guess after-thought.

- How to carve Ruby Vein: Use a silex and two Ruby Vein in a smithing table to obtain one Ruby Gemstone.
- How to craft Ruby Ameliorator: Use a Netherite Ingot and two Ruby Gemstones in a smithing table to make it.
- How to craft Ruby-Netherite Armor: Use a Netherite Armor piece and two Ruby Ameliorator in a smithing table to make one piece of the Armor Set.

</details>


<details>
<summary>Statistics</summary>

Ruby Armor/Tool Set:
- Pickaxe | Diamond Level | 4 Efficiency | 12 Enchantability | 4 Damage | 1 Speed | 1450 Durability | Cannot burn in fire.
- Sword | Diamond Level | 7 Efficiency | 12 Enchantability | 6.5 Damage | 1.6 Speed | 1450 Durability | Cannot burn in fire.
- Axe | Diamond Level | 7 Efficiency | 12 Enchantability | 7 Damage | 0.8 Speed | 1450 Durability | Cannot burn in fire.
- Shovel | Diamond Level | 6 Efficiency | 12 Enchantability | 3 Damage | 1 Speed | 1450 Durability | Cannot burn in fire.
- Hoe | Diamond Level | 6 Efficiency | 12 Enchantability | 3 Damage | 1 Speed | 1450 Durability | Cannot burn in fire.
- Helmet | 12 Enchantability | 3 DR | 1.5 Toughness | 0 KR | 385 Durability | Cannot burn in fire.
- Chestplate | 12 Enchantability | 7 DR | 1.5 Toughness | 0 KR | 560 Durability | Cannot burn in fire.
- Leggings | 12 Enchantability | 5 DR | 1.5 Toughness | 0 KR | 525 Durability | Cannot burn in fire.
- Boots | 12 Enchantability | 3 DR | 1.5 Toughness | 0 KR | 455 Durability | Cannot burn in fire.

Ruby-Netherite Armor/Tool Set:
- Pickaxe | Netherite Level | 6 Efficiency | 25 Enchantability | 5 Damage | 1 Speed | 2800 Durability | Cannot burn in fire.
- Sword | Netherite Level | 9 Efficiency | 25 Enchantability | 10 Damage | 1.6 Speed | 2800 Durability | Cannot burn in fire.
- Axe | Netherite Level | 9 Efficiency | 25 Enchantability | 12 Damage | 0.8 Speed | 2800 Durability | Cannot burn in fire.
- Shovel | Netherite Level | 8 Efficiency | 25 Enchantability | 4 Damage | 1 Speed | 2800 Durability | Cannot burn in fire.
- Hoe | Netherite Level | 8 Efficiency | 25 Enchantability | 7 Damage | 1 Speed | 2800 Durability | Cannot burn in fire.
- Helmet | 25 Enchantability | 4 DR | 3.5 Toughness | 0.2 KR | 880 Durability | Cannot burn in fire.
- Chestplate | 25 Enchantability | 9 DR | 3.5 Toughness | 0.2 KR | 1280 Durability | Cannot burn in fire.
- Leggings | 25 Enchantability | 7 DR | 3.5 Toughness | 0.2 KR | 1200 Durability | Cannot burn in fire.
- Boots | 25 Enchantability | 4 DR | 3.5 Toughness | 0.2 KR | 1040 Durability | Cannot burn in fire.

</details>
